political.s: PACCAR's political giving leans right, with FEC data showing donations of $30K and 90% Republican support (23,100/25,600). Current 2024 cycle contributions total $104,414, with $640,000 in lobbying expenditures focused on industry regulation and trade policy.

charity.s: PACCAR has donated over $200 million in grants globally through its foundation since inception, focusing on education, social services, and the arts. The company demonstrates a culture of giving through employee matching programs and community engagement.
charity.focus: Education, social services, arts, United Way

environment.s: PACCAR has received A or A- ratings from CDP for eight consecutive years, placing it among the top 1.5% of reporting companies. The company has set ambitious 2030 targets including 35% absolute reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions and 25% reduction in Scope 3 emissions per vehicle kilometer.

labor.s: PACCAR faced a significant OSHA whistleblower retaliation case when the company fired an employee in 2020 for raising COVID-19 safety concerns at its Texas facility. The company settled for $150,000 in 2022 without admitting wrongdoing, indicating labor relations concerns.

dei.s: PACCAR has a DEI rating of 3.9/5 on Glassdoor (equal to manufacturing sector average) and operates Diversity Councils globally with mentorship programs and heritage month celebrations. However, women comprise only 18% of the board and pay equity analysis has not been conducted.

animals.s: Not applicable to truck manufacturing company

guns.s: Not applicable to truck manufacturing company

privacy.s: Limited public information available on PACCAR's data privacy practices. The company's websites and policies do not provide detailed transparency regarding customer or employee data handling.

execPay.s: PACCAR maintains an extreme CEO-to-median employee pay ratio of 198:1 as of 2025, with CEO compensation at $19.45 million versus median employee compensation of $98,350. Despite shareholder approval, this wide disparity indicates poor pay equity alignment.

fec.committeeName: PEOPLE PAC (PACCAR INC EMPLOYEES ORGANIZED FOR POLITICAL LEADERSHIP AND EDUCATION PAC)

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
